Okay so as you can see here, I've got the editor open. If you look at this line right here, that's where we define the function. Now watch what happens when I click this button up here in the corner. See that? The output appears down here at the bottom. Now I'm going to drag this over there, and as you can see, the panel updates. This thing here, this little icon, that toggles it. Just look at what it does when I hover over it. Right there. You see how that highlights?
